sensitivity_analysis.primary_failure_reason: Deal is currently feasible but constrained by market and density breakpoints.
sensitivity_analysis.make_it_work_statement: Maintain pricing discipline and protect density yield to preserve current profitability.

breakpoints.explanation: This deal breaks when acquisition cost absorbs projected profit.
Per-home construction cost can move by this amount before ROI crosses zero.
Sale price per square foot must stay above this threshold for feasibility.
Additional or fewer units required before projected profit crosses zero.

economic_scenarios.explanation: Recommended max offer equals current land price plus projected profit at break-even.
Density curve compares ranked candidate economics across achieved unit counts.
Rezoning scenario did not produce valid layouts.

decision.reason: Base case ROI, downside range, and confidence clear the acquisition threshold.
decision.rationale: Selected layout layout-ut-utah-13727-f34485ff0276 with ROI 0.6287 and projected profit 7270571.79 from 16 ranked candidates.
